page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.e3.large is an x86_64 architecture server instance powered by an Intel Xeon 8269CY processor running at 2.5 GHz. It features 4 dedicated physical cores with 1 thread per core, providing 4 vCPUs. The instance is equipped with 32.0 GB of system memory, yielding a high memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per core. It does not include local storage or GPU accelerators, and operates on a KVM hypervisor.

Benchmark results indicate that the ecs.e3.large exhibits weak to poor performance across most compute and memory metrics. Both single-core and multi-core stress-ng CPU performance fall into the bottom 25%, while single-threaded gzip and bzip3 decompression tests rank in the bottom 10%. Memory bandwidth read operations are weak, though large-block write operations achieve average performance. Passmark database operations and Redis SET operations also place in the bottom 25%, reflecting limited throughput for transactional tasks.

The primary tradeoff of the ecs.e3.large is its high memory capacity relative to its modest compute capabilities. While it offers a generous 32.0 GB of RAM, the underlying Intel Xeon processor delivers lower-tier performance per core. This makes the instance qualitatively cost-effective for memory-intensive workloads that do not require high CPU throughput, such as caching layers, lightweight database hosting, or memory-bound utility applications.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.e3.large is an x86_64 memory-optimized server instance featuring 4 dedicated vCPUs and 32.0 GB of RAM. Powered by an Intel Xeon 8269CY processor running at 2.5 GHz, it operates on a KVM hypervisor without local storage or GPU accelerators. Performance benchmarks show weak to poor results, with stress-ng CPU performance and Passmark database operations falling into the bottom 25%, and single-threaded decompression tests in the bottom 10%. However, the instance maintains average large-block memory write bandwidth. The primary tradeoff is a high memory-to-vCPU ratio of 8.0 GB per core paired with modest compute capabilities. This configuration is best suited for memory-bound workloads with low CPU demands, such as caching layers, lightweight database hosting, and general-purpose utility tasks.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.e3.large is a memory-optimized server with 4 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs and 32.0 GB of RAM, offering a high memory-to-core ratio for memory-bound workloads with modest CPU requirements.

tagline: A memory-optimized server featuring a high memory-to-core ratio for workloads requiring substantial RAM but modest processing power.
bullet_points: 4 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs and 32.0 GB of RAM
High memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per core
No local storage or GPU accelerators included
Weak CPU and database benchmark performance
Best suited for caching layers and lightweight databases
